def positive_secrets_manager_client_created_per_function_call():
    rule_id = "secrets_manager_client_created_per_function_call"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "AWS Secrets Manager or Vault client instantiated on every function call instead of being cached."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
